mapper.insert: INSERT INTO competition_participants (competition_id, student_id, group_level) VALUES (#{competitionId}, #{studentId}, #{groupLevel})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM competition_participants WHERE competition_id = #{competitionId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT cp.id, cp.competition_id, cp.student_id, cp.group_level, u.real_name AS student_name, u.username AS student_username, u.phone AS student_phone, c.name AS campus_name, comp.name AS competition_name, comp.competition_date, comp.status AS competition_status FROM competition_participants cp LEFT JOIN users u ON cp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN campus c ON u.campus_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competitions comp ON cp.competition_id = comp.id WHERE cp.competition_id = #{competitionId} ORDER BY cp.group_level ASC, u.real_name ASC

SELECT cp.id, cp.competition_id, cp.student_id, cp.group_level, u.real_name AS student_name, u.username AS student_username, u.phone AS student_phone, c.name AS campus_name, comp.name AS competition_name, comp.competition_date, comp.status AS competition_status FROM competition_participants cp LEFT JOIN users u ON cp.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN campus c ON u.campus_id = c.id LEFT JOIN competitions comp ON cp.competition_id = comp.id WHERE cp.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY cp.id DESC
